steps.name: Request Made
steps.input: Client: RoomWise Property Management. Co-living rooms for rent in Dallas. Build homepage wireframe.
steps.output: Request logged. Context pulled from Reverb.

steps.name: Pull Client Context
steps.output: Membership-based co-living. Weekly payments. Flexible, community-focused. No exact addresses. CTA: Schedule a Tour.

steps.name: Build Wireframe
steps.input: RoomWise context, 9-section homepage plan (Nav → Hero → How It Works → Available Rooms → Why RoomWise → Testimonials → FAQ → CTA → Footer)

steps.name: Self-Healing QA Loop
steps.output: Wireframe exported and analyzed via vision model. 9 issues found — 2 Critical: (1) hero stat numbers colliding/overlapping with headline text making both illegible, (2) all 3 testimonial cards contain bracket placeholder text '[Resident testimonial placeholder]'. 1 High: Testimonial cards show 'Resident Name' generic placeholder. 4 Medium: Logo placeholder in header and footer, inconsistent feature section content, 'Move In Fast' section appears empty. 2 Low: star ratings lack numerical context, small body text in some sections. Testimonials and hero layout are priority fixes for client review.
